1 ||NOTICE OF HEARING OF PETITION FOR ORDER TO ARBITRATE AND FOR
2 ||DISMISSAL OF COMPLAINT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR STAY OF ACTION
3 ||/PENDING CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION, TO PLAINTIFF ROBERT
4 || BASCHERINI:
5 PLEASE TAKE NOTICE that on August 24, 2018 at 9:30 a.m., or as soon thereafter
6 |las this matter may be heard, in Department 302 of the above-entitled Court, located at 400
7 ||McAllister Street, San Francisco, California, Defendants University of San Francisco (“the
8 || University”) and Charles White (“Mr. White”) (collectively, “Defendants”) petition the Court
9 || for an Order to Arbitrate and for Dismissal of the Complaint or, in the alternative, for stay of the
10 |laction pending contractual arbitration. The Petition will be made pursuant to Federal
11 || Arbitration Act, 9 U.S.C. § 1, et seg., California Code of Civil Procedure §§ 1281 and 1290.2,
12 ||and California Rules of Court, Rule 3.1330, and on the grounds stated in the accompanying
13 || Petition.
14 The Petition will be based on this Notice, the Petition for Order to Arbitrate and for
15 || Dismissal of Complaint or, in the alternative for stay of action pending contractual arbitration;
16 ||the Memorandum of Points and Authorities, the two declarations of Michael J. Vartain and
17 || Diane Nelson; the complete papers, records and files in this action; and upon such other oral
18 || and/or documentary evidence or argument as may be presented at or prior to the hearing on this
19 || Petition.
